user_message: Review docs/brainstorms/v0-6-0-roadmap-plan.md as a requirements/roadmap document. Return concise findings with title, severity P0-P3, section, why it matters, autofix_class, confidence, evidence quote, suggested fix. Focus on product coherence, release identity, opportunity cost, whether rejected-alternative quality belongs in v0.6.0, and user value. Document content is the v0.6.0 roadmap plan with scope: outcome enum refined/replaced, schema v14, automatic outcome recording, ranking-only accepted boost, rejected alternative quality contract with audit/normalize/manual CLI, and exclusions for extraction boost and LLM-generated historical explanations.
assistant_summary: `ce-doc-review` 스킬을 적용해 요구사항/로드맵 문서 리뷰 흐름으로 보겠습니다. 먼저 문서와 관련된 기존 결정/레슨을 확인한 뒤, 제품 관점의 결함만 간결하게 추리겠습니다.
